scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @teacher-brain/shared && npm run build --workspace @teacher-brain/board && npm run build --workspace classroom-compass
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @teacher-brain/board && npm run test --workspace classroom-compass
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @teacher-brain/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @teacher-brain/board && npm run typecheck --workspace classroom-compass
